economic_notes: Tanizul Timber Ltd. is a wholly-owned business enterprise accounted for using the modified equity method. Tanizul Timber Ltd. reported revenue of $11,333,597 and net income of $7,947,516 in 2022. CMHC Social Housing Program is fully consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year 2022. Auditor name not visible in provided documents. Tanizul Timber Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBE); CMHC Social Housing Program fully consolidated. Earnings from investment in Nation business entities ($8,386,487) is a large non-cash equity pickup from Tanizul Timber Ltd. and is eliminated in cash flow statement. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($8,960,780) + Provincial Government ($3,742,547) + First Nation Health Authority ($2,332,158) + CMHC ($1,083,112) + Other Aboriginal Groups ($1,123412) + Other federal government funding ($353,887) - note Other Aboriginal Groups may not be strictly government transfers but included here. OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers. Long-term investments in Tanizul Timber Ltd. increased significantly from $3,891,967 to $12,278,453 reflecting strong timber revenues.
